title: The Bounty Hunters Drop the Act
description: On pages 6–8, the bounty hunters drop the act as while the crew sleeps after the feast, Zoro stays awake and discovers the town’s real identity as a nest of bounty hunters.
scene: The Bounty Hunters Drop the Act. While the crew sleeps after the feast, Zoro stays awake and discovers the town’s real identity as a nest of bounty hunters. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.
